_doc: Faithful-replay fixtures captured from a real faulted Orchestrator job (key e192429e-1248-4872-863a-24ad8f6e88fe, process EvidenceArchival, folder Shared). UiPath.Testing.Activities.AttachDocument threw System.IO.FileNotFoundException because FilePath pointed at a non-existent file (C:\TestData\evidence\run-report.pdf). Scrubbed: host -> MOCK-HOST, LocalSystemAccount -> UIPATH\REPLACEMENT_USER, personal-workspace email -> original_email@test.com.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key defb8e05-e36b-4c36-bf11-0b4d08ce6cd1 --state Faulted --output json

rules._doc: Generic jobs-list fallback -> same single target job.

rules.match: or jobs logs e192429e-1248-4872-863a-24ad8f6e88fe --level Error --output json

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback; both trace forms (or jobs traces / traces spans get) fall through to [] — the FileNotFoundException signature is fully carried by jobs get/logs.
